payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it represented the newer, current memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered because it was identified as superseded, so it should not be treated as current.
citations: input: Explain why recall returned mem_new for Sam from Goldman and filtered mem_old because it is superseded.
payload.decision: Recall kept the newer Goldman-related memory for Sam because it was the most recent and non-conflicting version, and filtered the older memory because it had been superseded by the newer one.

entity_resolution.reason: The input refers to Sam and Goldman as the same entities across mem_new and mem_old; no additional disambiguation was provided.
